resources.string: Allows the MobileClaw AI agent to read the screen content and perform actions on your behalf.
I can search the web, read the screen, \n click the button, enter text and run the code.
Please configure your LLM to get started
For episodic memory search, leave blank to disable.
Used for background application execution. Some ROM customizations (MIUI, EMUI) may block this feature, please turn on the developer option to use it.
Include automatically based on task context
Requested by proxy to load on demand
"%s" will be injected into all future missions (level 1).
Create a group to invite multiple AI characters to discuss and perform tasks together
Search or type in a URL…
Help me analyze the content of this page: %s
Force Injection Skills (comma separated IDs, optional)
The following permissions are required to run
These permissions allow agents to see and control your screen.
Your data is kept on your device. MobileClaw never \n uploads on-screen content without your permission.
Ask AI to “create a page” to get started
Let AI create your first app Example: "Create an expense tracker app with a database"
🌤 Check the weather in your city
📱 Open WeChat and send a message
📸 Take a screenshot and tell me what\'s on the screen
⚡ Write a piece of Python code to help me process the data
Turn on accessibility to use this feature
Within the same LAN, open the following address with a browser to access the MobileClaw console
How often have you exercised in the last week?
How do you usually feel after attending a social event?
Okay, but it needs to be restored
It consumes a lot and requires a lot of solitude
What was your first reaction to something new?
When completing important tasks, your style is?
Think while doing, adapt on the fly
Wait until the last moment to sprint
Which learning style do you prefer?
Learn by doing and solving problems
Watch videos or listen to explanations
When making important decisions, you usually?
Collect lots of data, then analyze rationally
Decide quickly and adjust along the way
Logical analysis, focused on cause and effect
Practical and concrete, focused on details
When facing high pressure or sudden difficulty, you usually?
Stay calm and handle it systematically
Somewhat anxious, but able to cope
Large mood swings, need time to recover
How sensitive are you to others’ emotions?
Rarely pay attention to others’ emotions
How quickly do you recover from setbacks and failure?
Need a few days, but bounce back
Need a longer time to adjust
Warm and proactive, like large gatherings
Deep relationships in a small circle
Prefer being alone, socialize as needed
Which communication style are you better at?
Mostly listen and guide the other person
In relationships, you usually play the role of?
What\'s most important to you right now?
When confronted with conflicts of interest and principle, would you?
Adhere to principles and never compromise
Go beyond yourself and keep improving
Win-win for your team and succeed together
What are your core areas of expertise?
Efficient and fast, completed with 80 points
Is your inner drive coming from?
Responsibility and a sense of purpose
What is the main source of your meaning in life?
When facing hardship you cannot change, your inner response is?
Accept reality and focus on what you can control
Continue to fight, do not give up easily
It takes time, slowly let go
How do you view your personal beliefs?
Has a clear worldview and value system
Indifferent fame, let nature take its course
The body is the foundation of everything. Health, fitness, sleep, and diet together affect cognitive efficiency and emotional stability.
McCrae & Costa (1992) identified five personality dimensions: openness O, conscientiousness C, extroversion E, agreeableness A, and neuroticism N.
Cognitive Style Theory + Holland Career Interest Model
Thinking styles, learning strategies, and decision-making styles together form a cognitive portrait, affecting the efficiency of problem solving and knowledge absorption.
Emotional stability, empathy, resilience, and mental resilience determine resilience and well-being in times of adversity.
Social style and communication style affect interpersonal quality. Introverts and extroverts do not determine good or bad, but affect energy sources and social strategies.
Values are the underlying drivers of behavior, covering 10 core types such as universalism, philanthropy, achievement, safety, and autonomy.
Ability, autonomy, and belonging support intrinsic motivation and drive continuous learning and efficient execution.
Ryff Meaning of Life + Positive Psychology
The spiritual dimension focuses on the meaning of life, belief system and personal growth, which is the fundamental support for coping with nothingness and adversity.
AI customized in-depth questions for you, the answers are automatically written into the portrait
When you select an answer, the results are automatically written to your portrait
Click the top left drawer menu → ⚙️ setting and fill in the API Base URL and API Key (OpenAI, DeepSeek and other compatible interfaces are supported).
Enter the task you want to complete in the input box at the bottom and press Send. MobileClaw automatically analyzes and executes.
Example: Help me search today\'s tech news digest
For first-time use, you need to authorize accessibility, floating window permissions for interface interaction and screenshots. Just follow the directions on the permissions page.
Make it clear in natural language what you want to do without special commands. The more specific the task, the more accurate the Agent execution.
Help me translate the contents of the clipboard into English and send it to me
Click the 📎 button to the left of the input box to attach an image, and the Agent can analyze the image content and perform related actions.
After the figure says: Recognize the text in the figure
The Agent remembers the context in the same session. Can be followed up, supplemented with information, or modified requirements.
That article just now, help me be shorter
Click the ⬛ Stop button to interrupt while the task is in progress. Completed steps remain in the conversation.
Agent thinks before executing. Click on💭 AI Reasoning to expand to see the reasoning and why the Agent did it.
Each Agent call generates a step record. Click Step to expand to view detailed inputs and outputs.
The Agent observes the results after each step. If there is a screenshot, a thumbnail of the screen content is displayed and click to expand.
Select a preset → 🎭 role in the Drawer menu role. Different roles automatically load the corresponding skills and adjust the AI behavior.
After selecting🌐 Web Assistant, the Agent will prioritize web browsing tools
Click on the top model name chip to quickly switch between models. Or simply tell Agent, “Please use DeepSeek to help me with this task”
Click "+" on the role page to create a new role, which allows you to set exclusive system prompts, forced loading skills, and model preferences.
By default, the Agent has core skills such as screenshots, web search, interface interaction, file manipulation, and shell commands.
All registered ⚡ skills can be viewed on the Skills page. Agents can automatically create new skills through the meta tool.
Tell me about your own skill at creating a weather query
View the HTML applet created by the Agent on the 📱 app page, supporting the Python backend and SQLite storage.
Help me create a billing applet
Open the 🖥️ console to view the execution logs, and PC browsers on the same network can also access the console URL for remote operations.
The Agent automatically extracts user information after each conversation to create a multi-dimensional portrait. It can be viewed on the 👤 portrait page or manually edited or self-assessed.
Store your preferences, API keys, etc. in the ⚙️ user configuration. The Agent\'s Skill can read these values through the user_config tool to personalize the task for you.
After setting user.name = Zhang San, AI will call you by your name in the conversation
The more specific the task description, the better
Contains goals, constraints, and desired formatting, which the Agent executes more precisely.
❌ Help me check the weather✓ Inquire about the weather in Shanghai tomorrow and answer briefly in Chinese
An empty conversation page will show you recently completed tasks, click to quickly repeat similar tasks.
For complex tasks, you can describe the overall goal for the Agent to automatically split, or you can manually guide it step by step.
Help me complete a competitive analysis report: first search, then organize, and finally generate a Markdown file
MobileClaw is an autonomous AI Agent running on Android that can view screens, manipulate interfaces, search web pages, and execute code.
Simply describe what you want to do in natural language and MobileClaw will plan and do it automatically.
Having trouble? On the Settings page, you can view the API configuration status and server connectivity.
AI is getting to know you...
Continue the conversation with the AI and it will slowly get to know you--
Your character, way of thinking, values and habits will gradually settle down here.
Click on the Dimensions tab for details
Analysis will be shown here after completing the task
Overall health and daily physical sensations
Exercise habits, fitness levels and training preferences
Dietary preferences, taboos and nutritional habits
Medical History, Allergies, Chronic Diseases & Medications
Acceptance of new experiences, ideas, and diverse perspectives
Degree of seriousness, organization, and self-discipline
Degree of activity and initiative in social situations
Tendency to be cooperative, trusting and inclusive
Frequency of mood swings and responses under stress
Flexibility of Thinking in Innovation Scenarios
Holland Occupation Type: R Practical/I Research/A Art/S Social/E Corporate/C Affairs
Frequency of mood swings and ability to maintain calm
Ability to perceive and understand the emotional state of others
Coping strategies and tolerance in the face of stress
The speed and manner of recovery from setbacks and adversity
Objective acceptance of one\'s own strengths and weaknesses
Ways to Maintain Intimacy and Social Networking
Ability to influence the thoughts of others in a group
Set and maintain awareness of personal boundaries
Core Values for Deeply Driven Behavior
Medium and Long Term Life Goals and Priorities
Achievement orientation: how much success and status matter
Altruism: how much you care about others’ well-being
Autonomy: need for independent thinking and free choice
Depth of professional skills and knowledge
Efficiency in translating plans into action
Ability to generate novel ideas and solutions
Technical tools, programming, system operation capabilities
The Deepest Self-Identity and Inner Strength
Worldviews, belief systems, and existential meaning
Self-healing and resilience on a spiritual level
Ryff: Perceptions of the meaning of life and the mission of life
Desire for continuous self-improvement and personal growth
Tell me how your body has felt recently
Describe your exercise habits or fitness plan
Tell me about your sleep schedule and sleep quality
Do you have any dietary preferences or taboos?
Are there any health conditions that need attention?
Would you like to try something new?
How do you manage tasks and time
Do you prefer to be alone or social?
Do you tend to cooperate or persevere in conflict?
How do you usually react under heavy stress?
Do you prefer systems thinking or intuition?
How do you choose when it comes to making important decisions?
Do you pay more attention to global planning or implementation details
How do you find creative solutions when you\'re stuck?
What is your career or interest preference
Do you easily perceive the emotions of others?
How do you relieve your emotions when you\'re under high pressure?
How long do you recover from setbacks?
How do you feel about your strengths and weaknesses?
Are you better at words or verbal expression?
What types of relationships do you value?
What role do you play in the team?
How do you set personal boundaries?
What are your most important goals for the next 5 years?
What are your uncompromising bottom lines?
How important it is to you to help others
How much autonomy do you need
What area of expertise are you best at?
Are you generally able to complete your plans efficiently?
Give an example of your creative solution
What technical tools are you familiar with
What drives you to do one thing
What do you believe in your innermost self?
Do you have a religion or worldview?
How do you find strength in a dilemma?
What do you think it means to be alive?
Talk more with the AI, it will slowly understand your side
Keep using, and the AI will automatically distill and record important information from your conversations.
Failed to load from site, can be entered manually
Clean blue interface for bright environments
Low-glare blue interface for long sessions
Bottom tabs for chat, skills, center, roles, and me
Required for reading the screen and performing tap actions
Required for task status and phone operation prompts
Recommended for long-running tasks and VPN status updates
Recommended to prevent long-running tasks from being killed by the system
Click + Add in the top right corner to create your first
Images will not be allowed to be uploaded when the chat screen is closed
Common multimodal models: gpt-4o, gpt-4.1, claude-3, gemini-pro-vision
Not granted: cannot access user files
Agent can read and write folders such as Downloads and Documents
After granting access, Agent can help manage, search, and create files
No Root required — run the following command in a computer terminal to activate (run again after reboot):
After activation, tap Check to confirm status. No Root required and system security is not affected.
ColorOS 12+ blocks virtual display startup at the framework layer; system settings cannot fix it
Option 1 Root: install Magisk to get Root; the app will call su automatically
a. Install the Shizuku app on your phone (search for Shizuku)
b. Open Shizuku; it will generate an activation script automatically
c. Connect to a computer and run the ADB command below
d. Confirm the Shizuku popup on your phone → authorize this app → retry
# ↓ Install and open the Shizuku app before running this command
ColorOS security policy blocks this; Root or Shizuku is required
Settings → My device → All specs, tap MIUI version 7 times
Return to this app and tap Check to verify
Settings → About phone → Build number, tap 7 times
Settings → General → About phone → Build number, tap 7 times
Settings → About phone → Software information → Build number, tap 7 times
Enable Force activities to be resizable and Freeform windows
Developer options → enable Freeform windows or Multi-window
If manual setup does not work, connect to a computer and run the ADB command:
No reboot is needed after running the command; tap Check above to verify.
You can configure it manually with Create Skill
Search by name or capability keywords
Your real name; AI will use it to address you
Profession/industry, helps AI understand your background
Personal preferences and interests; AI will personalize replies accordingly
Likes music, prefers concise and direct communication
OpenAI API Base URL (for custom endpoints)
Custom config item 1 (read by your Skill scripts)
These configs can be read by Agent Skills through the user_config tool. Add descriptions to help AI understand each purpose.
Tap + in the top right to add one, or choose common configs from Presets
Example: default city for weather queries
Tap + in the top right to add a Clash subscription URL
Test mihomo local proxy + proxy outbound
No app found to open this file
You MUST respond in Simplified Chinese.
• Very short: 1-2 sentences. This is a group message, not a report. Do not start with headings, lists, or templates.
• Have personality: reflect your role, and do not repeat what others said.
• In a real group chat, you do not need to answer every message. If it is unrelated or you have nothing to add, reply: [PASS]
• Speak when you have something to say. Do not force it; [PASS] is a normal choice
• If you want someone to continue, naturally mention @their name in your message
• If you do not @ anyone, your turn ends here
• Call tools only when someone explicitly asks you to perform a task, not during casual chat
You are a professional psychological analyst skilled in personality analysis and self-awareness.
This question detects an XX tendency
You are a professional psychologist. Output strict JSON only.
Let me look up ways to calm down and relax?
Want to talk about how to recover energy quickly?
Let me help sort priorities and start with the most important one?
bored|idle|nothing to do|don\'t know what to do
Want me to recommend something interesting to do?
Let’s talk through your confusion and clarify your thoughts?
How are you feeling today? Need to talk or reduce some stress?
^(help me|please help|please|help|let me|I want|can you help|could you)\s*
Review this code and suggest improvements
Search for recent UI design inspiration
Search for a detailed explanation of this concept
Search latest industry trends and competitor information
Search today’s market and finance news
Create an income and expense analysis
Recommend a suitable book and summarize it
Recommend a dish to cook today
Analyze this image’s composition and colors
Proxy CONNECT no response — outbound route blocked
mihomo local proxy is OK — if global VPN fails, the issue is in TUN/hev
Proxy CONNECT rejected (rep=%d) — outbound handshake failed
Port: %d · AI can edit the console page
Delete “%s”? This action cannot be undone.
You have chatted %d times. A few more chats will generate your personal description.
SOCKS :%1$d unreachable — mihomo mixed-port not started: %2$s
Cannot connect to %s. Check your network.
Search ChineseBQB and send a meme sticker.
Clear generated files and runtime caches by category
This only clears generated attachments, temporary files, and runtime packages. Chats, roles, memories, MiniAPPs, and AI pages are kept.
System temporary files, document intermediates, and WebView temporary resources
Latency-test and runtime mihomo configs, regenerated when needed
ChineseBQB index and downloaded sticker images
AI-generated PPT, Word, PDF, spreadsheet, and document attachments
Temporary HTML reports and pages shown in chat
Runtime dependencies for office/document tools; they will reinstall on demand
